1. api communication
   - gateway
   - service-a
   - service-b


pub/sub through kafka
service - a = ({counts:0, service:a}, {counts:0, service:b})
service - b = ({user:a1, servicecalls:1})
service - x = {item:a, user:a1}, {item:b,  user:a2}, {item:c, user:a3}, {item:a4}
service - gateway






here service-x updated and service-a, and service-b are side effect


service-x - service-a
service-x - service-b

service-a = service-b


producer = service-x, service-a
consumer = service-a, service-b
